allow: PowerShell(try { $r = Invoke-WebRequest -Uri 'http://localhost:8080/api/bank/send-code' -Method POST -UseBasicParsing -TimeoutSec 5; Write-Output \("Status: " + $r.StatusCode\); Write-Output $r.Content } catch { Write-Output \("Status: " + $_.Exception.Response.StatusCode.value__\); $s = $_.Exception.Response.GetResponseStream\(\); if \($s\) { $reader = New-Object System.IO.StreamReader\($s\); Write-Output $reader.ReadToEnd\(\) } else { Write-Output $_.Exception.Message } })

PowerShell($pids = \(netstat -ano | Select-String "LISTENING" | Select-String ":8080" | ForEach-Object { \($_ -split '\\s+'\)[-1] } | Select-Object -Unique\); $pids | ForEach-Object { Stop-Process -Id $_ -Force -ErrorAction SilentlyContinue; Write-Output "killed BE $_" }; Start-Sleep -Seconds 2; netstat -ano | Select-String "LISTENING" | Select-String ":8080" | Select-Object -First 1)

PowerShell($pids = \(netstat -ano | Select-String "LISTENING" | Select-String ":8080" | ForEach-Object { \($_ -split '\\s+'\)[-1] } | Select-Object -Unique\); $pids | ForEach-Object { Stop-Process -Id $_ -Force -ErrorAction SilentlyContinue; Write-Output "killed $_" }; Start-Sleep -Seconds 2)
